differential_diagnoses: Pulmonary sequestration (specifically extralobar given systemic arterial supply risk)
Meconium aspiration syndrome complicated by secondary infection
Congenital pulmonary airway malformation (CPAM) with superinfection
Hypoxic-ischemic encephalopathy (HIE) with secondary respiratory complications
next_steps: Perform chest CT angiography to evaluate for anomalous systemic blood supply and clarify structural lung pathology
Obtain tracheal aspirate for quantitative culture and sensitivity to direct antibiotic therapy
Review historical prenatal ultrasound data specifically for chest anomalies
Obtain brain MRI to assess for evidence of hypoxic-ischemic brain injury
Consult pediatric thoracic surgery for potential management of structural lung anomaly
